summary: There is currently no available clinical evidence from the provided literature supporting a role for Dickkopf-1 (DKK1) in prostate cancer. The reviewed studies do not address DKK1’s involvement in disease pathways such as bone metastasis or Wnt signaling inhibition within this context.
